summary: Highly praised 1984 show hailed as a top‑tier performance; recording details are not discussed.
review: Both reviewers rate this concert with five stars, calling it one of the best shows of ’84 and likening it to “Ventura Olympic Gold.” The comments focus entirely on the musical impact, with no mention of sound quality or technical issues, suggesting a strong performance that resonates with listeners despite the lack of recording specifics.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 5‑star reviews highlight an exceptional show; absence of recording details limits confidence but overall sentiment is strongly positive.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewers mention sound clarity, mix, or source type; recording quality cannot be assessed from the available comments.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers praise the overall strength of the performance but do not comment on specific songs or set pacing.
